name: Fine Swiss Weisswurst
recipeIngredient: 1 1/2 Teaspoons lemon zest, blanched, hopped sup
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine veal with salt and sugar.
2. Grind meat and jowl fat through the fine plate of a heavy-duty grinder separately. Place in individual bowls and chill well.
3. Add ground meat to a food processor, then add ice. Sprinkle spice mixture over ice.
4. Process mixture until very cold (30 degrees).
5. Stop machine, scrape down sides. Continue processing until temperature rises to 40 degrees. The mixture should resemble cake batter.
6. Add fat and process until the mixture reaches 45 degrees.
7. Add non-fat milk powder and process until the mixture reaches 58 degrees.
8. Stuff hog casings evenly with the mixture, avoiding any air pockets. Tie off with fine kitchen string.
9. Poach sausages in a shallow pan of simmering water (165 degrees) until internal temperature reaches 155 degrees. Be careful not to boil the water.
10. Remove sausages to an ice bath when cooked and cool in water bath until internal temperature reaches 60 degrees.
11. Cook, fry, or grill and serve. Yield: 6 servings
